Arguments.query: INSERT INTO lessons_learned (topic, content, agent, tags, metadata) VALUES ('Workspace Path Alignment in Standalone IDE', 'When duplicating or copying a .agents configuration directory and bootstrap.md from another project (like antigravity-project to telemetry-dashboard), it is critical to systematically update all hardcoded absolute references and paths inside the rules, workflows, lifecycle hooks, and docs. If left unchanged, safety gates and validator scripts will look in the wrong directory and fail or lock out workspace changes. Default python paths to system /usr/bin/python3 if the target workspace does not have a local python virtual environment to prevent command execution issues.', 'IDE Agent', ARRAY[]::text[], '{"containerTag": "telemetry-dashboard"}'::jsonb);

args.toolAction: Archiving lesson learned in Supabase database
